! Title: TemizWeb Ultimate
! Description: Türkçe odaklı, gizlilik dostu NSFW ve dikkat dağıtıcı yüzey filtresi
! Homepage: https://erdemyasar-web.github.io/TemizWeb/
! License: GPL-3.0-or-later
! Version: 1.0.0
! Expires: 12 hours
!
! SafeSearch veya YouTube Restricted Mode zorlanmaz.
! Telemetri yoktur; filtreleme cihaz üzerinde uBlock Origin tarafından yapılır.

! YouTube — amaçlı kullanım korunur; Home, Shorts ve öneriler kaldırılır
www.youtube.com##ytd-browse[page-subtype="home"] ytd-rich-grid-renderer
youtube.com##ytd-browse[page-subtype="home"] ytd-rich-grid-renderer
m.youtube.com##ytm-browse[page-subtype="home"] ytm-rich-grid-renderer
m.youtube.com##ytm-browse[tab-identifier="FEwhat_to_watch"] ytm-rich-grid-renderer
m.youtube.com##ytm-browse[browse-id="FEwhat_to_watch"] ytm-rich-grid-renderer

youtube.com##ytd-guide-entry-renderer:has(a[href^="/shorts"])
youtube.com##ytd-mini-guide-entry-renderer:has(a[href^="/shorts"])
youtube.com##ytd-rich-section-renderer:has(a[href^="/shorts"])
youtube.com##ytd-reel-shelf-renderer
youtube.com##ytd-rich-item-renderer:has(a[href^="/shorts/"])
youtube.com##ytd-video-renderer:has(a[href^="/shorts/"])
m.youtube.com##ytm-pivot-bar-item-renderer:has(a[href*="/shorts"])
m.youtube.com##ytm-pivot-bar-item-renderer:has-text(/^Shorts$/i)
m.youtube.com##ytm-guide-entry-renderer:has(a[href*="/shorts"])
m.youtube.com##ytm-reel-shelf-renderer
m.youtube.com##ytm-shorts-lockup-view-model
m.youtube.com##ytm-video-with-context-renderer:has(a[href*="/shorts/"])
m.youtube.com##ytm-rich-item-renderer:has(a[href*="/shorts/"])

youtube.com##ytd-watch-next-secondary-results-renderer
m.youtube.com##ytm-item-section-renderer:has(ytm-compact-video-renderer)
youtube.com##.ytp-endscreen-content
m.youtube.com##.ytp-endscreen-content

! Reddit — site korunur, işaretli/açık yetişkin kartları gizlenir
reddit.com##shreddit-post[nsfw]
reddit.com##article:has([aria-label*="NSFW" i])
reddit.com##div[data-testid="post-container"]:has([aria-label*="NSFW" i])
reddit.com##shreddit-post:has-text(/\b(NSFW|Pornhub|OnlyFans|Fansly|GoneWild|Rule\s*34|Hentai|XXX)\b/i)
reddit.com##article:has-text(/\b(NSFW|Pornhub|OnlyFans|Fansly|GoneWild|Rule\s*34|Hentai|XXX)\b/i)
reddit.com##shreddit-post:has-text(/\b(porno(?:grafi|grafik|su)?|çıplak\s+(?:fotoğraf|video)|erotik\s+(?:video|fotoğraf)|seks\s+videosu|ifşa\s+(?:video|fotoğraf))\b/i)

! Instagram — profiller, mesajlar ve doğrudan gönderiler korunur
instagram.com##a[href^="/reels/"]
instagram.com##a[href="/explore/"]
instagram.com##a[href^="/explore/"]
instagram.com##article:has(a[href*="/reel/"])
instagram.com##div[role="presentation"]:has(a[href*="/reel/"])
instagram.com##div[role="main"] section:has-text(/^(Suggested for you|Önerilenler|Senin için önerilenler)$/i)

! Diğer kart tabanlı platformlar
x.com##article:has-text(/\b(NSFW|Pornhub|OnlyFans|Fansly|GoneWild|Rule\s*34|Hentai|XXX)\b/i)
twitter.com##article:has-text(/\b(NSFW|Pornhub|OnlyFans|Fansly|GoneWild|Rule\s*34|Hentai|XXX)\b/i)
tumblr.com##article:has-text(/\b(NSFW|Pornhub|OnlyFans|Fansly|Rule\s*34|Hentai|XXX|porn(?:ography)?|nudes?)\b/i)

! Arama motorları — SafeSearch zorlamadan yüksek güvenli sonuç kartlarını gizler
! Not: erotizm/cinsellik gibi eğitim ve haber bağlamı taşıyabilen tek kelimeler evrensel engellenmez.
google.com,google.com.tr##div.MjjYud:has-text(/\b(Pornhub|OnlyFans|Fansly|GoneWild|Rule\s*34|Hentai|XXX|porn(?:ography)?|nudes?)\b/i)
google.com,google.com.tr##div.MjjYud:has-text(/\b(porno(?:grafi|grafik|su)?|çıplak\s+(?:fotoğraf|video)|erotik\s+(?:video|fotoğraf)|seks\s+videosu|ifşa\s+(?:video|fotoğraf))\b/i)
bing.com##li.b_algo:has-text(/\b(Pornhub|OnlyFans|Fansly|GoneWild|Rule\s*34|Hentai|XXX|porn(?:ography)?|nudes?)\b/i)
duckduckgo.com##article[data-testid="result"]:has-text(/\b(Pornhub|OnlyFans|Fansly|GoneWild|Rule\s*34|Hentai|XXX|porn(?:ography)?|nudes?)\b/i)
search.brave.com##div.snippet:has-text(/\b(Pornhub|OnlyFans|Fansly|GoneWild|Rule\s*34|Hentai|XXX|porn(?:ography)?|nudes?)\b/i)
yandex.com,yandex.com.tr##li.serp-item:has-text(/\b(Pornhub|OnlyFans|Fansly|GoneWild|Rule\s*34|Hentai|XXX|porn(?:ography)?|nudes?)\b/i)
search.yahoo.com##div.algo:has-text(/\b(Pornhub|OnlyFans|Fansly|GoneWild|Rule\s*34|Hentai|XXX|porn(?:ography)?|nudes?)\b/i)

! Görsel arama kartları — metin/URL işareti olan yüksek güvenli sonuçlar
google.com,google.com.tr##div[data-cid]:has-text(/\b(Pornhub|OnlyFans|Fansly|GoneWild|Rule\s*34|Hentai|XXX|porn(?:ography)?|nudes?)\b/i)
bing.com##a.iusc[href*="porn" i]
bing.com##a.iusc[href*="hentai" i]
bing.com##a.iusc[href*="onlyfans" i]
yandex.com,yandex.com.tr##div.serp-item:has-text(/\b(Pornhub|OnlyFans|Fansly|GoneWild|Rule\s*34|Hentai|XXX|porn(?:ography)?|nudes?)\b/i)

! Upstream: HaGeZi NSFW (GPL-3.0)
||adult-example.test^
||hentai-example.test^
